abilities.description: Until your next turn, CARDNAME becomes a copy of target creature with a counter on it, except it's 7/5 and it has this ability.

effect.description: Until your next turn, CARDNAME becomes a copy of target creature with a counter on it, except it's 7/5 and it has this ability.
effect.name: Clone

abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature with a counter on it

triggers.description: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a -1/-1 counter on up to one target creature.
